subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hearkened unto the Call of God when it was raised in truth, and answered his Ancient Lord, that he may repose in the grace of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن سمع ندآء الله اذ ارتفع بالحق و اجاب مولاه القدیم لیطمئن بفضل الله و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
